_comment: Localization file for bot messages. Add translations here. If a key is missing, the default message from code will be used.
welcome_message:
Welcome to the Video Submission Bot!

Send me a video to submit it for publication.
video_approved_queued: Your video has been approved and added to the publication queue.
video_not_approved: Your video was not approved for publication.
video_scheduled: Your video has been scheduled for publication on {scheduled_time}.
unauthorized_action: You are not authorized to perform this action.
video_already_processed: This video has already been processed
video_already_published_or_rejected: This video has already been published or rejected
no_pending_videos: ℹ️ No pending videos to approve.
approve_all_summary_with_failures:
✅ Approved {approved_count} video(s)
❌ Failed to approve {failed_count} video(s)
unauthorized_command: ❌ You are not authorized to use this command.
schedule_quick_title:
⚡ Quick Schedule - Video {video_id}
Select time from now:
schedule_choose_date_title:
📅 Choose Date - Video {video_id}
Select a date:
schedule_time_in_past: Selected time is in the past. Please choose a future time.
user_blacklisted: ❌ You are not allowed to submit videos.
blacklist_user_not_found: ℹ️ User `{user_id}` was not in the blacklist.
blacklist_invalid_user_id: ❌ Invalid user ID. Please provide a numeric user ID.
blacklist_clear_all_confirm:
⚠️ *WARNING*: This will remove ALL users from the blacklist.

Are you sure?
blacklist_usage:
❌ Invalid syntax.

*Usage:*
`/b` - Show blacklist
`/b <user_id>` - Add user
`/b clear <user_id>` - Remove user
`/b clear all` - Clear all
